description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, gray-tiled roof and a pink and white exterior. The front facade features a gated entrance, a driveway leading to a garage, and a small landscaped yard with a tree and a circular paved area. The left side of the building includes a balcony with outdoor seating and a satellite dish, while the right side has a visible garden gazebo. The rear of the bungalow is more enclosed, with minimal windows and a recessed central section. The structure is surrounded by low hedges and a metal fence, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, pink and white two-story bungalow with a flat roof, gated front yard, garage, and landscaped garden areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, driveway, garage, balcony, and landscaped yard with a tree and circular paved area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the balcony with seating, satellite dish, and the extended side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a more enclosed facade with minimal windows and a recessed central section.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the garden gazebo, additional landscaping, and a long, windowed wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
